subject: Re: dautoalign4warp
body:
Hey Felix,
Having imod activated (sourcing the script imod provides) in the shell that you launch matlab from should be enough!
Cheers,
Alister
Sent from mobile - apologies for brevity
On 9 Jun 2023, at 07:50, Felix Lange <felix.lange.le@gmail.com> wrote:
﻿Hi Alister,
I have an additional question regarding the script. When running the program, I get stuck on the dms2mod script with the notion "point2model" not found. I cannot find a suitable way to pass along the options for the command. Did you just included Imod into the shared libraries (
LD_LIBRARY_PATH
) 
and then it works or is there another trick?  When instead of command = ['point2model'] the full path to p2m ('usr/local/imod/bin/realbin/point2model') is used the command is located but a conflict with the libraries arises.
Cheers,
Felix 
Felix Lange schrieb am Mittwoch, 7. Juni 2023 um 15:23:48 UTC+2:
Hi Alister,
Yes, correctly! I am not sure what made me do it like this in the first place... 
But using 'some/filelocation/' is used within all cases of any Dynamo walkthrough so it should have been obvious.
When debugging it looked like "some/filelocation/" will be passed as a char and not transformed to a string at any point thus, creating the error. Anyways! 
Thank you for your fast responses and all the best,
Felix 
alist...@gmail.com
 schrieb am Mittwoch, 7. Juni 2023 um 15:08:02 UTC+2:
Hey Felix,
You mean that 
dautoalign4warp("/scripts/dynamo/imod/", 1.984, 2, 95.4, "/scripts/dynamo/dRecon”)
Doesn’t work
And
dautoalign4warp('/scripts/dynamo/imod', 1.984, 2, 95.4, '/scripts/dynamo/dRecon')
Does?
🤦🏼‍♂️
Glad it’s sorted anyway - I’ll update the README
On 7 Jun 2023, at 13:25, Felix Lange <
felix.l...@gmail.com
> wrote:
Hi Alister,
you indicated that it might be a simple issue. It was indeed. For all people running into this issue, I used " " to indicate the file locations while ' ' would be necessary. Now with this change everything is working.
Cheers,
Felix
alist...@gmail.com
 schrieb am Mittwoch, 7. Juni 2023 um 11:38:23 UTC+2:
You’ll have to step through and see what’s going on then if there aren’t any explicit errors 
Cheers,
Alister
Sent from mobile - apologies for brevity
On 7 Jun 2023, at 10:36, Felix Lange <
felix.l...@gmail.com
> wrote:
﻿It does work to the point that it will try to create the workflow for all TS but it doesn't produce an actual alignment. Strange
alist...@gmail.com
 schrieb am Mittwoch, 7. Juni 2023 um 11:25:08 UTC+2:
Looks like it’s only a problem in the alignment stats stuff - try commenting out line 35 here
autoalign_dynamo/dautoalign4warp.m at master · alisterburt/autoalign_dynamo
github.com
Good luck!
Alister
Sent from mobile - apologies for brevity
On 7 Jun 2023, at 10:16, Felix Lange <
felix.l...@gmail.com
> wrote:
﻿Hi Alister,
sure! Here it is:
>> dynamo
Launching general menu of Dynamo programs....
 Dynamo version: v-1.1.532
  
>> autoalign_activate
Successfully activated 'autoalign_dynamo'!
dautoalign4warp("/scripts/dynamo/imod/", 1.984, 2, 95.4, "/scripts/dynamo/dRecon")
Assuming creation of new tilt series alignment worklow 'TS02.mrc'
Creating workflow with name: 'TS02.mrc'
On path: /scripts/dynamo/dRecon
Warning: All string and cell array inputs must be the same size or scalars. 
> In autoalign_warn (line 7)
In handle_exception (line 10)
In dautoalign4warp (line 33) 
Warning: Attempting to continue... 
> In autoalign_warn (line 7)
In handle_exception (line 11)
In dautoalign4warp (line 33) 
Warning: File 'tmp.csv' not found. 
> In autoalign_aux_cleanup (line 2)
In dautoalign4warp (line 35) 
Warning: File 'tmp.tlt' not found. 
> In autoalign_aux_cleanup (line 3)
In dautoalign4warp (line 35) 
cat: '/scripts/dynamo/dRecon/*/info/fitting.doc': No such file or directory
Error using dlmread
Empty format character vector is not supported at the end of a file.
Error in csvread (line 53)
    m=dlmread(filename, ',', r, c); %#ok<*DLMRD>
Error in autoalign_summarise (line 7)
    m = csvread(fullfile(output_folder, 'rms.txt'));
Error in dautoalign4warp (line 36)
            autoalign_summarise(output_folder)
 
The MatLab Version is 2022b
alist...@gmail.com
 schrieb am Mittwoch, 7. Juni 2023 um 10:58:07 UTC+2:
Hey Felix,
Can you post the full trace back? Probably some matlab update has changed how you’re supposed to do something simple 
Cheers,
Alister
Sent from mobile - apologies for brevity
On 7 Jun 2023, at 09:49, Felix Lange <
felix.l...@gmail.com
> wrote:
﻿Dear all,
I wanted to test the dautoalign4warp script to align tilt series processed in warp in dynamo. Right at the first TS I receive the following error:
Warning: All string and cell array inputs must be the same size or scalars.
My input looks like this:
dautoalign4warp("scripts/dynamo/imod/", 1.984, 2, 95.4, "scripts/dynamo/dRecon")
for the requested format of the function "dautoalign4warp(warp_imod_dir, apix, fiducial_diameter_nm, nominal_rotation_angle, output_folder)"
Does anyone knows how to solve this issue? Thank you and all the best,
Felix
